description_long: This is a modern MSI computer monitor with a wide, slightly curved display and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a thin black bezel framing the screen, with the MSI logo and a red dragon emblem prominently displayed at the center of the screen. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, angular V-shaped stand that provides stability and a contemporary look. The rear of the monitor is faceted with geometric lines and a matte black finish, and the stand connects centrally, rising from a wide base. No physical buttons or ports are visible from any angle, suggesting a clean and uncluttered exterior. The overall appearance is professional and high-tech, suitable for gaming or office environments.
description: A sleek, curved MSI computer monitor with a thin black bezel, prominent logo, and a sturdy V-shaped stand. The design is modern and minimal, with a matte black finish and no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved display, thin bezel, and MSI logo with red dragon emblem on the screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the monitor's slim profile, the curve of the screen, and the angular V-shaped stand.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the faceted matte black back panel, central stand attachment, and geometric design lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the slimness, curve, and the structure of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a matte finish with sharp corners and minimal texture, providing a modern, unobtrusive frame around the display.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular V-shaped base made of metal or reinforced plastic, with a central support column connecting to the rear of the monitor. It appears sturdy and stable, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A prominent MSI logo with a red dragon emblem is visible at the center of the screen in the front view, and a smaller MSI logo is present on the bottom bezel.
